pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run with Java 11 features if the source/target compatibility remains set to 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace removed javax.annotation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing compile errors for code using @PostConstruct, @PreDestroy, etc., without an explicit dependency.
